'''Ace Entertainment Corporation''' was a company which owned a number of upscale [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] establishments and [[Casino/Legends|casinos]] that were scattered across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. One of Ace Entertainment's most popular establishments was the [[Ace of Sabres]], which was located on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Kluistar]]. The company was used by owner/founder [[Sibarra]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] as a front for his illegal criminal enterprise.
